question.english: I'd like to know about a memorable experience you had while spending your free time recently. What did you do, who were you with, and what made that experience so unforgettable? Please describe it in detail.
question.korean: 최근 여가 시간에 가졌던 기억에 남는 경험에 대해 이야기해 주세요. 무엇을 했고, 누구와 함께 있었으며, 왜 그 경험이 그토록 잊지 못할 만큼 특별했나요? 자세히 설명해 주세요.
question.combo_context: 여가 생활/취미 관련 3연속 콤보 질문 중, '최근에 겪은 특별한 경험(과거 경험)'을 묻는 세 번째 단계의 질문입니다. MP-디테일-감정-마무리 구조를 극대화하여 과거 시제로 서술해야 하는 전형적인 AL 공략형 문항입니다.

model_answer.script:
You know, looking back, there was this one Saturday last month that really stands out. I was feeling incredibly burnt out and desperate to escape the daily grind, so I decided to head out to a local historic neighborhood without any concrete plans.

Normally, I'd just stay home, but that day, I wanted to take a stroll and explore. While walking around, out of the blue, it started to drizzle. Instead of rushing to find shelter, I stepped into a cozy, quiet alleyway café. The smell of fresh coffee and the sound of rain tapping on the glass was just magical.

I sat by the window, ordered a warm latte, and just started reading a novel. The thing is, I was so into it that I completely lost track of time. I sat there for hours, just soaking up the atmosphere. It felt incredibly peaceful, and my mind was totally at ease.

Honestly, that simple, unplanned afternoon left a lasting impression on me. It made me realize that the best memories are often the unexpected ones. That's definitely a free-time experience I won't forget anytime soon.
model_answer.structure_note: 서론/MP [첫 문단: 번아웃으로 일상을 벗어나 계획 없이 동네로 나선 상황 제시] → 디테일 1 [두 번째 문단: 산책 도중 갑자기 내린 비를 피해 아늑한 카페로 들어간 구체적 에피소드] → 디테일 2 및 감정 [세 번째 문단: 독서에 몰입하며 시간 가는 줄 모르고 평온함을 느낀 감정 묘사] → 마무리 [네 번째 문단: 뜻밖의 순간이 주는 가치와 깨달음을 언급하며 인상 깊게 마무리]
al_points: 과거 시제 서사에서 'was feeling', 'started', 'stepped', 'sat' 등 과거 진행형과 단순 과거 시제를 혼선 없이 정확하고 일관되게 사용했습니다.
out of the blue, the thing is, looking back 등 원어민들이 대화의 흐름을 부드럽게 이어갈 때 쓰는 구어체 디스코스 마커가 적재적소에 배치되었습니다.
단순한 사실 나열에 그치지 않고 비 내리는 소리(tapping on the glass), 커피 향(smell of fresh coffee) 등 감각적 묘사와 평온했던 내면의 감정 변화를 유기적으로 연결했습니다.

vocab.example: I was feeling incredibly burnt out and desperate to escape the daily grind, so I decided to head out to a local historic neighborhood.
vocab.collocation: escape the daily grind of life

vocab.example: Normally, I'd just stay home, but that day, I wanted to take a stroll and explore.
vocab.collocation: take a stroll along the beach

vocab.example: While walking around, out of the blue, it started to drizzle.
The thing is, I was so into it that I completely lost track of time.
I sat there for hours, just soaking up the atmosphere.
Honestly, that simple, unplanned afternoon left a lasting impression on me.
vocab.collocation: leave a lasting impression on someone

vocab.example: I had an hour before my friend arrived, so I decided to kill time by browsing a nearby bookstore.
vocab.collocation: kill time waiting for a flight

vocab.example: On weekends, I love to indulge in my favorite hobbies without worrying about work.
Going for a run in the evening always helps me clear my head after a stressful day.
vocab.collocation: clear my head of negative thoughts

vocab.example: I didn't make a strict itinerary for the trip; I just wanted to go with the flow.
I was completely absorbed in the movie and didn't hear my phone ringing.
vocab.collocation: be completely absorbed in a book

vocab.example: I booked a weekend trip to Jeju Island to break free from the monotony of office life.
vocab.collocation: break free from the monotony of daily life

vocab.example: Instead of staying indoors, I decided to go for a leisurely walk in the park.
vocab.collocation: go for a leisurely walk after dinner

vocab.example: We sat at an outdoor cafe in Paris, simply taking in the vibes of the city.
Meditation is a great way to escape the stress and get some peace of mind.
vocab.collocation: get some peace of mind after work

vocab_quiz.question: 다음 중 '지루하고 반복되는 일상에서 탈출하다, 벗어나다'라는 의미를 가진 표현은 무엇일까요?
다음 중 '갑자기, 느닷없이'를 뜻하는 영어 숙어는 무엇일까요?
다음 중 '분위기를 만끽하다, 마음껏 느끼다'에 해당하는 영어 표현은 무엇일까요?

다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 표현을 고르세요. 
"While walking around, ____________, it started to drizzle."

다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 표현을 고르세요. 
"The thing is, I was so into it that I completely ____________ and sat there for hours."
스크립트의 'take a stroll' 대신 쓸 수 있는 가장 자연스러운 대체 표현은 무엇일까요?
스크립트의 'soaking up the atmosphere'와 의미가 같아 바꾸어 쓸 수 있는 구어체 표현은 무엇일까요?

patterns.pattern: I was desperate to [verb], so I decided to...
patterns.usage_today: I was feeling incredibly burnt out and desperate to escape the daily grind, so I decided to head out to a local historic neighborhood without any concrete plans.
patterns.extra_example: I was desperate to clear my head, so I decided to go for a drive late at night.

patterns.usage_today: It made me realize that the best memories are often the unexpected ones.
patterns.extra_example: Living alone made me realize that doing chores takes a lot of time and effort.

checklist: 오늘의 핵심 어휘(core/extend)를 최소 4개 이상 스크립트에 활용하여 답변했나요?
과거 경험을 이야기할 때 시제가 흐트러지지 않고 과거 시제로 일관되게 발화했나요?
Main Point 제시 이후 구체적인 상황 묘사(시간, 날씨, 장소 등)를 2가지 이상 덧붙였나요?
경험을 나열하는 데 그치지 않고, 당시에 느꼈던 감정과 생각을 자연스럽게 표현했나요?
결론부에서 교훈이나 전체적인 감상을 말하며 깔끔하게 마무리 문장을 완성했나요?
영어 말하기 중 당황해서 어색하게 침묵하지 않고 필러(You know, The thing is 등)를 사용해 극복했나요?
